required_preferences.fact: Discontinued all high-impact exercise, including indoor cycling — now substitutes daily gentle yoga and light stretching routines for aerobic activity, as doctor-ordered until foot heals

supersedes.fact: Discontinued morning jogging during spring pollen season — now exclusively utilizes indoor recumbent bike or guided indoor yoga for aerobic exercise until pollen counts subside

required_preferences.fact: Plans regular solo dinners and schedules video calls with partner during mealtimes, as they will be living apart due to the relocation; shared in-person meals become occasional and tied to visits.

supersedes.fact: No longer able to schedule a fixed weekly dinner with partner due to rotating 12-hour shifts; now plans spontaneous meals together when their schedules overlap, regardless of weekday or weekend

required_preferences.fact: Plays board games with friends at home — never goes to noisy game bars
Takes short day trips to parks or museums on holiday weekends, avoids overnight travel due to pet care
Keeps a shared digital calendar with his parents to coordinate medical appointments and household assistance, updating it actively as needs change.
Records video lectures for asynchronous viewing and prefers to pre-edit them before uploading — avoids live-streaming whenever possible

persona: A community college instructor teaching academic writing skills
